shortDescription: ✨ Medicube PDRN Pink Collagen Exosome Shot 7,500ppm – Microneedling in a Bottle! ✨
description:
✨ Medicube PDRN Pink Collagen Exosome Shot 7,500ppm – Microneedling in a Bottle! ✨













🔬 Spa-grade micro‑needling serum made for home use! With 7,500 ppm exosome spicules, pure Salmon DNA PDRN, and ultra-low molecular collagen, this serum resurfaces skin, firms texture, and amps up your glow.



💗 Pink power without artificial dyes—the natural hue comes from its active botanicals and peptides, delivering that instant “glass skin” aesthetic. ()



🌟 Key Benefits:



• Boosts absorption by ~475%—let your skincare routine work smarter, not harder

• Improves elasticity, brightens hyperpigmentation, hydrates deeply—in just 1–2 uses

• Exosome-coated spicules gently deliver actives with a satisfying tingling effect—aka “microneedling without needles”

• Minimal irritation formula—though a light tingling or redness is normal and signals it’s working





🌿 Skin Types & Concerns:

All skin types welcome, best for texture, enlarged pores, uneven tone, dullness, and early signs of aging.



⏱ How to Use:



• Start with freshly cleansed, dry skin.

• Apply serum evenly (avoid eyes/lips) and pat gently.

• Let the spicules absorb for a minute—they dissolve naturally.

• Follow with your favorite serum and moisturizer.

• Use every 2–3 nights for visible smoothness, or once a week if you prefer.





🛍 Size:



• 30 ml (1 fl oz) bottle



✅ Ideal Add-on: Pair with Medicube AGE‑R Booster Pro for enhanced absorption & spa-like glow!
🚚 Free Shipping on all orders – Kimi.pk

Product Highlights



• 💧 Ultra-Hydrating Formula – Infused with hyaluronic acid and vitamin E to lock in moisture for plump, juicy lips.

• 🌿 Nourishing Botanicals – Enriched with jojoba oil and shea butter for a silky-smooth finish.

• 🌟 High-Shine Finish – Glossy, non-sticky texture that catches every ray of light.

• 🛡️ Long-Lasting Wear – Stays put through sips and smiles, with minimal feathering.





How to Use



• Exfoliate lips gently, then pat dry.

• Apply 1–2 coats of Pout Perfect Shine.

• Let the formula work its magic for 2–3 minutes—feel the plump!

• Reapply as desired for extra shine and dimension.





Why You’ll Love It



• ✨ Perfect for everyday glam or special occasions

• ❤️ Safe for sensitive lips—no harsh irritants

• 📦 Sleek, travel-friendly tube fits in any clutch

shortDescription: • Product Name: Medicube Red Acne Succinic Acid Peel (40 g) 🔴✨
description:
• Product Name: Medicube Red Acne Succinic Acid Peel (40 g) 🔴✨

A potent peeling serum designed to give you a professional-grade exfoliation at home, targeting acne, blackheads, and excess sebum for a clearer, smoother complexion.



• Key Benefits:



• Triple Acid Complex (21 %): Formulated with 5 000 ppm Succinic Acid, 5 000 ppm Salicylic Acid, and 200 000 ppm Lactic Acid to dissolve dead skin cells, unclog pores, and fade pigmentation—without irritation. 🍃🧪

• Acne & Sebum Control: Succinic Acid delivers anti-bacterial and anti-inflammatory action, while Salicylic Acid penetrates deep to clear blackheads and whiteheads. Lactic Acid gently exfoliates surface flakes for brighter skin tone. 🌟🩸

• Soothing & Preventive Care: Infused with Centella Asiatica extracts and Tea Tree Water to calm redness, reduce razor bumps, and help prevent future breakouts. 🌿💧





• How to Use:



• After cleansing, pat skin completely dry.

• Apply a thin, even layer on the face, avoiding eye and lip areas. ⏱️

• Leave on for 1–2 minutes, then rinse off thoroughly with lukewarm water.

•
Weekly Treatment: Use once a week for maximum effect. For gentler daily exfoliation, dilute one drop of serum in 700 mL of water. 💦
Tip: Always follow with sunscreen during daytime routines, as AHAs/BHAs can increase sun sensitivity.





• Suitable For:



• All skin types, especially oily, acne-prone, and combination skin. 👍

• Sensitive skin (free of harmful irritants), thanks to its calming botanical extracts. 🌱





• Key Ingredients:



• Succinic Acid (5 000 ppm): Pore-refining & sebum control.

• Salicylic Acid (5 000 ppm): Deep-cleansing BHA for acne improvement.

• Lactic Acid (200 000 ppm): AHA for gentle exfoliation & brightening.

• Centella Asiatica Extracts & Madecassoside: Calming and anti-inflammatory.

• Tea Tree Leaf Water & Extract: Antimicrobial for acne prevention.

• Niacinamide & Glycerin: Skin barrier support and hydration.





• Why You’ll Love It:



• Instant, visible peeling effect that resurfaces dull skin. 🔄

• Lightweight, water-based texture that absorbs quickly. 💧

• Noticeably reduces blackheads, whiteheads, and bumps with continued use. 👌

• Made in South Korea with high-quality, skin-friendly ingredients. 🇰🇷





• Net Weight: 40 g (40 mL) 📏

Cera ve AM Facial moisturizing Lotion Product Description:

CeraVe AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion with SPF 30 is a multi-benefit moisturizer designed to hydrate and protect your skin throughout the day. 🌞 Formulated with essential ceramides, niacinamide, and hyaluronic acid, it helps restore the skin's natural barrier while providing broad-spectrum UVA/UVB protection. This lightweight, non-greasy lotion is perfect for daily use, leaving your skin feeling smooth and protected. 🌿💧

Key Benefits:
- Provides all-day hydration 🌱
- Broad-spectrum SPF 30 protection 🌞
- Restores and maintains the skin's natural barrier 💪
- Lightweight and non-greasy formula ✨
- Suitable for all skin types 🧴

How to Use:
Apply liberally 15 minutes before sun exposure. 🌞 Reapply at least every 2 hours, especially after swimming or sweating. Use as part of your morning skincare routine.

Ingredients:
Water, Homosalate, Octinoxate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Niacinamide, Ceramide NP, Ceramide AP, Ceramide EOP, Hyaluronic Acid, and more.

Start your day with CeraVe AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion for hydrated and protected skin. 🌟

Key Benefits:
- Provides overnight hydration 🌱
- Restores and maintains the skin's natural barrier 💪
- Lightweight and non-greasy formula ✨
- Calms and soothes the skin 🌿
- Suitable for all skin types 🧴

How to Use:
Apply liberally to the face and neck at night after cleansing. 🌙 Use as part of your evening skincare routine for best results.

Ingredients:
Water, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Niacinamide, Ceramide NP, Ceramide AP, Ceramide EOP, Hyaluronic Acid, and more.
